_comment: English → Japanese | Month 1 Week 2 | Extended Reading
title: Extended Reading: A Trip to Akihabara
description: Read a longer passage about shopping in Tokyo's electronics district.

blocks.passage:
📖 あきはばらへ いきます (Akihabara he ikimasu - Going to Akihabara)

マイクは とうきょうに います。(Mike wa Toukyou ni imasu) - Mike is in Tokyo.
あきはばらへ いきます。(Akihabara he ikimasu) - He is going to Akihabara.

あきはばらは アニメの まちです。(Akihabara wa anime no machi desu) - Akihabara is the town of anime.
ゲームも たくさん あります。(Geemu mo takusan arimasu) - There are also many games.

マイクは みせに はいります。(Mike wa mise ni hairimasu) - Mike enters a shop.
「すみません、このゲームは いくらですか？」("Sumimasen, kono geemu wa ikura desu ka?") - "Excuse me, how much is this game?"

「それは ごせんえんです。」("Sore wa gosen en desu.") - "That is 5,000 yen."
ごせんえん... (Gosen en...) - 5,000 yen... 
マイクは ゲームを かいます。(Mike wa geemu wo kaimasu) - Mike buys the game.

マイクは とても うれしいです。(Mike wa totemo ureshii desu) - Mike is very happy.

questions.q: What is Akihabara known for in this story?

items.explanation: No, he is in Tokyo (とうきょうにいます).

items.statement: There are many games in Akihabara.
items.explanation: Yes. ゲームもたくさんあります (There are also many games).

items.statement: Mike didn't buy the game because it was 5,000 yen.
items.explanation: He DID buy it. マイクはゲームをかいます (Mike buys the game).
